description.en:
Green Horizon Industries introduces Industrial Hemp to Farming Simulator 25.
Phase 2.6 test build: adds a packaged icon filename, uses the safe rebuilt Blender greenhouse generator, keeps descriptor version 91 for the current local FS25 setup, and keeps the Hemp Greenhouse store item wired for the next visibility test.

text.name: function_ghi_hempGreenhouse
text.en: Grows industrial hemp from water and hemp seed.
